data.current_description: Create a new verification session and generate an identification token
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new identity verification session and generates an authentication token for the verification process. Accepts verification parameters via GenerateTokenRequest (25 configurable properties). Returns a GenerateTokenResponse containing the generated token and session details. The token enables subsequent identity verification operations and establishes a new verification session state on the server.
